title: bulbine narcissifolia
intro: Bulbine narcissifolia, also known as Ornamental Onion or Red Hot Poker, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. It is native to South Africa and is prized for its striking red and yellow flowers that attract butterflies and bees. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its medicinal properties attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and combat infections. The bulbs of the plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which have been used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.
